title: Output Contract (meta-schema notes)
description: Guidance, not a validator. Each task produces its own concrete output.schema.json; this document records the rules those per-task schemas must follow so every backend's harness can validate output identically.

requirements.description: Rules every per-task output.schema.json must satisfy.
default: Be a valid JSON Schema (draft-07) document.
Set additionalProperties:false on objects whose shape is fixed, so malformed extra fields fail loud.
Mark every field the spec considers required as required.
Encode the structural acceptance criteria (ordering, length, field equality constraints) wherever JSON Schema can express them, so the harness's non-zero-exit-on-violation contract enforces them.
Contain no instance-specific constant values unless the corresponding input field is marked 'fixed' in the pattern-spec.
